title: Wireguard Interface Credential Schema v1.0.0
description: ACDC credential schema for Wireguard VPN interface configuration. Defines a host's Wireguard interface settings including address, port, DNS, and metadata. This credential is issued to a specific host AID and contains self-contained interface configuration without peer information.

u.description: UUID salty nonce for credential uniqueness

i.description: Issuer AID (network administrator or credential authority)

ri.description: Registry Identifier for Transaction Event Log (TEL) credential status tracking

s.description: Schema SAID - must match this schema's $id

i.description: Issuee AID - the host that this interface belongs to

interface.description: Wireguard interface configuration for this host

address.description: VPN IP addresses in CIDR notation (e.g., 10.0.0.1/24)

listenPort.description: UDP port for Wireguard to listen on

table.description: Routing table identifier (e.g., 'auto', 'off', or table number)

preUp.description: Commands to execute before interface is brought up

preDown.description: Commands to execute before interface is brought down

postUp.description: Commands to execute after interface is brought up

postDown.description: Commands to execute after interface is brought down

interfaceMetadata.description: Metadata describing the interface purpose and deployment

interfaceName.description: Human-readable interface name (used for config filename)

interfaceDescription.description: Purpose or description of this interface

environment.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g., production, staging, development)
